psychologicalTheme: Desperate symbiotic parasites. Anxious attachment — needs partners urgently, will accept almost any treaty. Type 2 (Helper) with achiever wing: gives in order to receive, charm masking desperation. High neuroticism drives constant anxiety about being abandoned. Moderate Machiavellianism because symbiosis requires subtle persuasion. Under stress, becomes aggressive and controlling (Type 8 direction) — the desperate host-seeker turns predatory. Highest first-contact warmth because they NEED connection to survive.
